headline: ONEOK Schedules 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders; Sets Record Date
summary: TULSA, Okla., March 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE) will hold its 2026 annual meeting of shareholders virtually on May 20, 2026, at 9 a.m. Central Time. Shareholders of record as of March 23, 2026, are entitled to receive notice of and vote at the annual meeting. What: ONEOK, Inc. 2026 Annual Meeting of ShareholdersWhen: 9 a.m. Central, May 20, 2026Where: Virtual meeting How: Shareholders may register online beginning April 1, 2026, using the control number found on your Not
